9:00AM DEPT 8, JUDGE DAVID E. OTIS. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, STEVEN LITTMAN, DEFT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN & RETURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMER, LARRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1452 HOWARD ST. #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103 $5,579.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,579.00, LEASE FORFEITED
